title: Ways to Express an Integer as Sum of Powers
titleCn: 将一个数字表示成幂的和的方案数

testcases.input: n = 10, x = 2 Output: 1 Explanation: We can express n as the following: n = 32 + 12 = 10. It can be shown that it is the only way to express 10 as the sum of the 2nd power of unique integers.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We can express n as the following: n = 32 + 12 = 10. It can be shown that it is the only way to express 10 as the sum of the 2nd power of unique integers.

testcases.input: n = 4, x = 1 Output: 2 Explanation: We can express n in the following ways: - n = 41 = 4. - n = 31 + 11 = 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can express n in the following ways: - n = 41 = 4. - n = 31 + 11 = 4.
